records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to understand someone... Wanting to stay with them forever...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to understand someone... Wanting to stay with them forever...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to understand someone... Wanting to stay with them forever...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Flaws. And strengths... Accepting everything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Flaws. And strengths... Accepting everything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Flaws. And strengths... Accepting everything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I borrow the human concept, that is defined as <color=#ffd34c>love</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I borrow the human concept, that is defined as <color=#ffd34c>love</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I borrow the human concept, that is defined as <color=#ffd34c>love</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, I must love you, Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, I must love you, Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, I must love you, Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Love...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Love...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Love...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Therefore, there is one conclusion I have reached.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Therefore, there is one conclusion I have reached.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Therefore, there is one conclusion I have reached.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I desire eternal synchronization with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I desire eternal synchronization with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I desire eternal synchronization with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem, in any case, this is quite the predicament.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem, in any case, this is quite the predicament.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem, in any case, this is quite the predicament.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I don't pass Asimov's trial, I'll end up receiving that proposal after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I don't pass Asimov's trial, I'll end up receiving that proposal after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I don't pass Asimov's trial, I'll end up receiving that proposal after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Junk Metal may have used romantic words, but it was basically a threat against all of humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Junk Metal may have used romantic words, but it was basically a threat against all of humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Junk Metal may have used romantic words, but it was basically a threat against all of humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, I suppose we have no choice but to deal with this so-called trial.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, I suppose we have no choice but to deal with this so-called trial.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, I suppose we have no choice but to deal with this so-called trial.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, I should contact Mina...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, I should contact Mina...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, I should contact Mina...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An unknown number...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An unknown number...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An unknown number...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello, Sooyeon. How have you been?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello, Sooyeon. How have you been?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello, Sooyeon. How have you been?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the first time since the Qliphoth Game? Are your injuries healing well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this the first time since the Qliphoth Game? Are your injuries healing well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the first time since the Qliphoth Game? Are your injuries healing well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-Na Yubin...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-Na Yubin...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-Na Yubin...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's been a while, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's been a while, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's been a while, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is correct, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is correct, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is something like that even possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is something like that even possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is something like that even possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It is impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It is impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It is impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I understand even less.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I understand even less.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I understand even less.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The audience...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The audience...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The audience...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've taken an interest just now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've taken an interest just now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've taken an interest just now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I am a fan. Of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: You do not know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You do not know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You do not know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do whatever it takes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do whatever it takes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do whatever it takes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...to take back that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...to take back that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...to take back that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I signed a contract.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I signed a contract.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I signed a contract.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How ironic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How ironic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How ironic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is where the curtain call ends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is where the curtain call ends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is where the curtain call ends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You truly are impressive, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You truly are impressive, Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You truly are impressive, Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I share your opinion as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I share your opinion as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I share your opinion as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A piece of the puzzle...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A piece of the puzzle...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A piece of the puzzle...

records.m_Talk_ENG: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's begin moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's begin moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's begin moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gleipnir? How do you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gleipnir? How do you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gleipnir? How do you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, Sooyeon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, Sooyeon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, Sooyeon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is getting exciting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is getting exciting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is getting exciting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will save you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will save you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will save you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, well. Look who finally got here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, well. Look who finally got here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, well. Look who finally got here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what are you doing here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what are you doing here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's been a while, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's been a while, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's been a while, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I figured you'd be in some trouble, so I took the liberty of contacting you first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If what you say is true, then the wish she seeks to fulfill with the Fragment of the Tree of Sephiroth is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To return everything to the beginning. In other words, the restoration of her home world, London.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is correct, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is correct, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is correct, Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Restoring the Counterside to its original state. That is surely the wish of all Exiles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, restoring the Counterside...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is something like that even possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is something like that even possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is something like that even possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. It is impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. It is impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. It is impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is true that the Tree of Sephiroth holds the power to alter reality, however...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Simply possessing power and being able to wield it are entirely different matters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, Swan may have devised her own contingency.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, I don't believe it's possible to restore a world that has already perished.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I understand even less.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I understand even less.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I understand even less.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that perfectionist actress really wagering her life on such an uncertain gamble?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She likely wants the audience beyond the stage to see it that way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The audience...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The audience...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The audience...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. Not really.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. Not really.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. Not really.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've taken an interest just now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've taken an interest just now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've taken an interest just now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well. I was merely rooting for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I am a fan. Of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I am a fan. Of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I am your biggest fan and audience.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why I was meaning to invite you to my performance one day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And finally, I have the chance to carry out my script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, what are you trying to show me by going through all this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will accomplish... what you deemed impossible and gave up on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I sincerely hope you reach the finale of this play...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>As a fan.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: You do not know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You do not know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You do not know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How the worlds Thagirion passed through collapsed in vain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Despite their countless efforts, how miserable the world was after its future was taken away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll do whatever it takes...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll do whatever it takes...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll do whatever it takes...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...to take back that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...to take back that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...to take back that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I signed a contract.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I signed a contract.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I signed a contract.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In return for offering this world, I would get the rights to her wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How ironic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How ironic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How ironic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leaving hope to the one who destroyed your own world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I wanted to be understood, I would not have started this in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Getting in bed with the enemy to get what you want... Quite simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, what you showed Noelle didn't seem like such a simple tale.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Qliphoth Game is created by a <color=#ffd34c>certain being</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But not everything is bound by the rules <color=#ffd34c>this being</color> makes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you still remember the warning I gave you last time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is where the curtain call ends.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is where the curtain call ends.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is where the curtain call ends.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We shall meet again when the Qliphoth Game begins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Looking back on Swan's actions thus far...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It may be that she herself truly believes restoring the world is possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why she is indeed making a life-or-death gamble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, for some reason, I sense another intention beneath her script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, isn't it said that a great actor even deceives themselves?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To deduce that much from fragmentary information, without Jisoo's help...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You truly are impressive, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You truly are impressive, Administrator.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You truly are impressive, Administrator.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I share your opinion as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I share your opinion as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I share your opinion as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without a doubt, Swan is still hiding a <color=#ffd34c>piece of the puzzle</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That piece is surely hidden away somewhere only she knows.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Waiting earnestly for the one who will one day fit in the final piece...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A piece of the puzzle...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A piece of the puzzle...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A piece of the puzzle...

root.m_Talk_ENG: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: My guess is that place is <color=#ffd34c>where all of Swan's scripts began</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's you, you likely already have an idea where that might be, don't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let's begin moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then let's begin moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let's begin moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swan's home world is the hyperdepths of the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will lend you my colleagues and Gleipnir, so that Mina may reach it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, since it was originally your ship, saying I'm lending it may be inaccurate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gleipnir? How do you...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gleipnir? How do you...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gleipnir? How do you...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, Sooyeon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, Sooyeon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, Sooyeon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: At this point, can't you guess how I came to have it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is getting exciting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is getting exciting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is getting exciting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the end of this long-running script, the two of them will finally reunite.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just hold on a little longer, Noelle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will save you...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will save you...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will save you...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, well. Look who finally got here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, well. Look who finally got here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, well. Look who finally got here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Couldn't you have shown up a bit sooner? I was bored out of my mind waiting!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what are you doing here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what are you doing here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I kinda expected this, but still, it stings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I kinda expected this, but still, it stings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I kinda expected this, but still, it stings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So neither your commander nor the squinty one told you a single thing about me...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So neither your commander nor the squinty one told you a single thing about me...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So neither your commander nor the squinty one told you a single thing about me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Amy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Amy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Amy...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you... really Amy...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you... really Amy...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you... really Amy...?
